prose: The frontier orbitals analysis of aniline has been performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (defined as tier 'standard') in PySCF, under gas-phase conditions with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The calculated HOMO–LUMO gap is 5.30482 eV. The calculation fully converged within 9 SCF cycles, and no warnings or errors were reported. The result is derived from the electronic energy of the system, which converged to a finite value. Coordinates originate from the provided file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz, and a single-point orbital-energy calculation was performed on this fixed geometry.
